info.title: Starting the cluster services for one node

topic.para: Perform this procedure on the node you want to start:

step.para: Log in to the node either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
If you rebooted the node, check whether the cluster services started automatically:
Both &corosync; and &pace; should be active. This might take some time.
If the cluster services don't start on their own, start them manually:
Check the status of the cluster:
The node might have the status standby or maintenance, or it might have neither of those depending on what you did.
